overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a nighttime walk through a rain-drenched futuristic city. The scene features intense neon lighting in purple, cyan, and orange hues, wet reflective surfaces with ray-traced reflections, and dense cyberpunk architecture with large digital billboards and elevated walkways.

scene_state.functional_zone: rainy urban intersection with neon-lit crosswalk

events.description: begins ascending concrete stairs with orange safety railing

agents.ego_description: walking through rain-soaked crosswalk and ascending stairs to elevated walkway

entered.detail: yellow and white striped pedestrian crossing painted on wet asphalt
illuminated advertisement poster with 'NICK & ROCK' text and food imagery
purple and orange neon strips lining the edges of distant buildings
bright orange metal barrier along the elevated walkway edge

segments.scene_description: The segment opens at a rain-soaked urban intersection with a prominent crosswalk. Neon lights reflect off the wet pavement as the camera holder walks forward and begins ascending a concrete staircase with orange safety railings, transitioning from street level to an elevated pedestrian walkway.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated pedestrian walkway with orange safety barriers

events.description: camera tilts upward to look at tall glass building facade against rainy sky

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along elevated pathway beside orange railing, observing the city lights and rain

notable_agents.action: walking past camera in opposite direction along the pathway

entered.detail: tall modern building with reflective glass facade rising into the rain
deciduous trees with green foliage lining the right side of the walkway
concrete pedestrian path raised above street level with safety barriers

segments.scene_description: Walking along an elevated concrete pathway bordered by bright orange safety railings, with a modern glass office tower visible ahead. The rain continues to fall as the camera briefly tilts upward to view the building facade, and a pedestrian passes by in the opposite direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit food stall area with purple and cyan lighting

events.description: approaches brightly lit food stall with vivid purple neon trim and glowing interior

agents.ego_description: approaching and passing a neon-lit food vendor stall with purple and cyan lighting

notable_agents.action: vendor working inside the food stall behind the counter

entered.detail: small food vendor booth with curved roof outlined in bright purple neon lights
yellow and black automated vending unit with illuminated display
digital advertisement panel on the food stall showing 'AVANTE' text

segments.scene_description: The walkway leads to a vividly lit food stall wrapped in purple and cyan neon lights. The camera approaches the stall where a vendor is visible working inside, passing by the glowing structure and vending machines while the rain continues to fall around the sheltered area.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway under highway overpass with digital billboards

events.description: enters covered walkway beneath concrete overpass with large digital advertisements

agents.ego_description: walking under the concrete overpass past large digital billboards and support pillars

notable_agents.action: walking ahead in the distance under the overpass

entered.detail: large vertical digital screen displaying 'SAMURAI' text with purple and white graphics
massive concrete highway structure forming a ceiling over the walkway
thick cylindrical columns supporting the overpass structure
illuminated advertisement display showing colorful graphics on the right wall

segments.scene_description: Transitioning into a covered walkway beneath a massive concrete overpass, sheltered from the rain. Large digital billboards including one for 'SAMURAI' illuminate the walls, while concrete support pillars line the left side. The wet pavement reflects the artificial lighting as the camera moves deeper under the highway structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial storefront area with Broseph Brewing Company signage

agents.ego_description: approaching the Broseph Brewing Company storefront at the end of the covered walkway

entered.detail: large illuminated sign reading 'BROSEPH BREWING CO' with blue and white lettering
commercial building facade with the brewery signage and glass entrance

segments.scene_description: The final segment approaches the Broseph Brewing Company storefront, with its prominent illuminated signage visible on the right. The camera continues walking forward along the wet concrete pathway, passing out from under the overpass into a more open commercial area with additional digital displays.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a rain-slicked street intersection up into a sheltered, neon-lit commercial corridor. It begins at a wet urban crosswalk, moving forward and ascending a concrete staircase with orange railings to reach an elevated pedestrian walkway. As the camera progresses past a modern glass office tower and a passing pedestrian, the path leads toward a food stall glowing in vivid purple and cyan neon. The scene then shifts into a covered walkway beneath a massive concrete overpass, where the rain ceases and the environment is illuminated by large digital billboards, including one for Samurai. Finally, the camera moves deeper under the highway structure before emerging into an open commercial area, passing the illuminated signage of the Broseph Brewing Company.
